channel.title: Mom's Resin Tables
channel.description: Handcrafted resin tables, river tables, and live edge tabletop builds made in Safety Harbor, Florida.

item.g:title: Tideforge Top Design
item.g:description: A compact top design with a layered shoreline effect in teal and earth tones. Mixed reclaimed hardwood strips and pigmented epoxy resin. Hand-sanded, high-build polyurethane top coat. Top only — approx. 20 in W x 14 in D x 1.5 in H. One of one.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Furniture > Tables > Coffee Tables

item.g:title: Mosaic Hearth Top Design
item.g:description: A longer geometric striping layout with rich contrast and deep gloss finish. Multi-species reclaimed hardwood mosaic top with flood-coat resin seal and UV-resistant polyurethane. Top only — approx. 40 in W x 16 in D x 1.5 in H. One of one.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Furniture > Tables > Coffee Tables

item.g:title: Chevron Lumen Top Design
item.g:description: A warm chevron composition with clean color transitions and reflective depth. Works beautifully in bright, modern interiors. Mixed hardwood chevron build with clear epoxy, glass-like resin flood coat. Top only — approx. 22 in W x 16 in D x 1.5 in H. One of one.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Furniture > Tables > Coffee Tables

item.g:title: Riverline Top Design
item.g:description: A two-tier side table featuring a flowing resin river and visible edge character from the original slab. Live edge hardwood slab with teal epoxy channel, high-gloss resin and polyurethane blend. Top only — approx. 23 in W x 16 in D x 1.5 in H. One of one.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Furniture > Tables > Coffee Tables

item.g:title: Atelier Stripe Top Design
item.g:description: A low-profile accent piece with alternating wood species and subtle tonal shifts. Great for lounge corners and studio spaces. Mixed reclaimed woods with clear resin, resin flood coat with hand-buffed shine. Top only — approx. 26 in W x 18 in D x 1.5 in H. One of one.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Furniture > Tables > Coffee Tables

item.g:title: Longline Mosaic Top Design
item.g:description: An elongated bench silhouette with strong visual rhythm in green and gold tones, suitable as a coffee bench or entry feature. Reclaimed hardwood strip top with resin-protected durable satin edges. Top only — approx. 46 in W x 14 in D x 1.5 in H. One of one.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Furniture > Tables > Coffee Tables

item.g:title: Prism Chevron Top Design
item.g:description: A bold diagonal composition with premium contrast and mirror finish, crafted for design-forward interiors. Multi-species hardwood with pigmented resin and deep high-gloss resin top. Top only — approx. 23 in W x 16 in D x 1.5 in H. One of one.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Furniture > Tables > Coffee Tables

item.g:title: Wrought Bloom Top Design
item.g:description: A decorative coffee table top with warm, highly reflective striped patterning. Striped hardwood top with embedded resin, gloss resin with sealed edge detailing. Top only — approx. 34 in W x 22 in D x 1.5 in H. One of one.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Furniture > Tables > Coffee Tables

item.g:title: Aqua Vein Top Design
item.g:description: A natural slab bench with an organic aqua inlay that highlights grain movement and edge texture. Live edge slab with translucent aqua epoxy channel, resin and polyurethane protective top coat. Top only — approx. 36 in W x 16 in D x 1.5 in H. One of one.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Furniture > Tables > Coffee Tables

item.g:title: Artisan River Panel Set (3-Piece)
item.g:description: A collectible trio of artisan resin-wood panels for shelf styling, desk display, or wall-adjacent accent. Mixed hardwood sections with colored resin channels, gloss hand-finished seal. Tallest panel approx. 14 in H x 6 in W. One-of-one set.

item.g:title: Cedar Facet Top Design
item.g:description: A dramatic silhouette with sculptural side profile and warm cedar tones under a glassy top layer. Cedar and mixed reclaimed species with resin reinforcement and high-build clear coat. Top only — approx. 24 in W x 18 in D x 1.5 in H. One of one.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Furniture > Tables > Coffee Tables

item.g:title: Teal River Console Top Design
item.g:description: A long-form live edge bench with a vibrant teal channel, built to stand out in entryways and studio lofts. Natural live edge slab with teal epoxy inlay, mirror resin coat with hand-smoothed edges. Top only — approx. 44 in W x 15 in D x 1.5 in H. One of one.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Furniture > Tables > Console Tables
